title: Punchy! – Cobblemon Integration
description: This resource pack ensures that the Punchy!mod works alongside Cobblemon
body:
![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6841eecbba2d355fa1bda4bcd8b6d32f7a12f72.png)
[![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd0f864ea3f42c5fea8b031d295d760c0b9ade40.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon)
[![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f396d32da19f0d7199681144b354ab316875b487.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/punchy-fpa)
![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe6a62b8791acf855a45890c1c29eb30d412a083_0.webp)
       This resource pack adapts the "punchy!" mod to work perfectly with Cobblemon. 
      A casual project created to ensure seamless compatibility and visual fluidness.
                       _I hope you all really enjoy the result!!!🥺_
       [![ko-fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bf066af272238db30fd64143496458a2c755cc9.png)](https://ko-fi.com/punchycobblemonintegration)
